task: edu case list should recalculate Day 0 progress from checked safety concept drafts

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion reporting requires requirement-to-evidence mapping, real runtime or user-facing verification, completion guard evidence, and exact residual risk reporting.
Code, deployment, UI, and customer-facing changes require real verification and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Main training card must stop showing Day 0 progress 0% after the Day 0 safety concept cards were checked.
requirements_checklist.evidence: harness-os/backend/main.py now detects checked safety_concept_* IDs in ui_state.stage_drafts.day0.stage_checked and treats all required checked concepts as Day 0 completion during _edu_vp_refresh_state.

requirements_checklist.requirement: The cases/list endpoint must not show stale progress from an old snapshot.
requirements_checklist.evidence: edu_vp_training_cases now calls _edu_vp_refresh_state(summary) before reading progress and flow_outline, so existing snapshots are recalculated for the list card.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Regression coverage must include the old saved-draft shape.
requirements_checklist.evidence: tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py adds test_refresh_counts_checked_day0_concepts_as_completion, asserting Day 0 completed, flow pct 100, overall pct 50, and Day 1 selection from stage_checked concept IDs.
